name: Footer Columns
description: Multi-column site footer with branding, link groups, social icons, and legal text.

standard.description: Logo/brand column + 3 link columns + bottom copyright row.

slots.brand: Logo, tagline, and optional social icons
slots.link-group-1: First column of footer links with heading
slots.link-group-2: Second column of footer links with heading
slots.link-group-3: Third column of footer links with heading
slots.copyright: Bottom row spanning full width with copyright text

minimal.description: Single row with logo + links + social icons.

auradecantism.notes: Brand name uses d-gradient-text. Links use _fgmuted with _h:fgfg transition. Border uses rgba(255,255,255,0.08).

preset_notes.standard: 4-column grid. Brand column has d-gradient-text logo. Social icons use _fgmuted.
preset_notes.minimal: Single-row flex. Brand name with d-gradient-text.

command-center.notes: Standard footer styling with cc-label headings.

clean.notes: Clean, minimal footer. Standard link styling.
